title: Some os win symbols should be declared static
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 18;
UPDATE test_table SET age = age + 1 WHERE name = 'Alice';
key_bug_features: os win symbols not declared static
